hero_description: I develop web applications using Spring Boot and React. Passionate about solving real-world problems, clean code, automation, and user-friendly interfaces.
about_motivation: What drew me to software development was curiosity. What keeps me here is the opportunity to solve real problems and build products that people actually use.
about_what_i_do: I develop full-stack web applications using Spring Boot and React, from backend APIs to responsive user interfaces. I believe that great products are built on clean architecture, thoughtful UX, and attention to details.
about_attitude: For me, every project is more than an opportunity to write code - it's a chance to create something truly useful.
about_problem_solver_description: Turning complex requirements into simple solutions
about_continuous_learner_description: Always exploring new technologies and improving my skills
about_clean_code_description: Writing maintainable, readable, and reliable software
about_product_mindset_description: Building applications that solve real problems for real users
skaitrixa_subheading: Mental math training platform for primary school students
skaitrixa_description: Developed the full application cycle - from database structure to a PWA with offline mode. Built an admin panel with CRUD for schools, classes and users, plus a system for teachers to create tests and students to complete them. Wrote unit tests (Vitest + React Testing Library) and E2E tests (Cypress).
projects_coming_soon_description: Something exciting is on its way...
